home.subtitle: Self-hosted Minecraft skin site and authlib-injector compatible authentication server.
home.heroCopy: AsterYggdrasil provides secure, stable, and fast Yggdrasil authentication with easy skin management for a complete Minecraft experience.
home.featureSecureDescription: Yggdrasil-compatible authentication keeps account access controlled.
home.featureProfilesDescription: Keep Minecraft names, UUIDs, and account ownership under your own service.
home.featureTexturesDescription: Upload, manage, and share Minecraft skins and capes after signing in.
home.featureAuthDescription: Use site accounts for authlib-injector compatible launcher login.
home.featureStableDescription: Low-latency authentication paths are designed for high availability.
home.featureControlDescription: Runtime settings, keys, and audit records stay behind the admin workbench.
home.audienceDescription: Whether you run a server, build integrations, or just want a clean skin workflow, AsterYggdrasil keeps the core tools close at hand.
home.audienceServerDescription: Provide reliable Yggdrasil authentication for Minecraft server operators.
home.audienceDeveloperDescription: Clear API endpoints and integration values make deployment easier.
home.audienceSkinDescription: Rich skin and cape management helps players express their style.
home.audienceCommunityDescription: Support shared communities with controlled account and profile workflows.

errorPage.notFoundDescription: Looks like this path points outside the loaded world.
errorPage.genericDescription: The current view failed before it could render. You can return home or go back and try again.
errorPage.reasonMoved: The page may have moved or been deleted
errorPage.reasonPermission: You may not have permission to access this page
errorPage.helpDescription: If you think this is a mistake, include the error code when contacting the site administrator.

launcher.title: Launcher access
launcher.description: Add this authentication server in your launcher, then sign in with your site account.
launcher.userTitle: Add this site to your launcher
launcher.profileTitle: Use a profile in your launcher
launcher.userDescription: Add this authentication server in a launcher that supports authlib-injector, then sign in with your site account and choose your Minecraft profile.
launcher.externalLoginName: Choose external login in the launcher
launcher.externalLoginDescription: Use your site account username or email and password.
launcher.apiRootHint: If the launcher asks for an authentication server address, paste the displayed API Root.
launcher.selectProfile: Choose your Minecraft profile after signing in
launcher.selectProfileName: Choose the profile you want after signing in
launcher.selectProfileDescription: Profiles, skins, and capes are resolved from this site.
launcher.profileHint: Profiles and skins are managed here; the launcher only signs in and starts the game.
launcher.dragHint: Launchers that support drag-and-drop server setup will recognize this authlib-injector address.
launcher.serverOwnerDescription: Place authlib-injector.jar in the server directory, add the JVM argument before -jar, and keep online-mode=true.
launcher.secureProfileDescription: authlib-injector v1.2.0 and newer should keep secure profile checks enabled. Keep these server.properties values, then use the same launch command.
launcher.connectionDescription: Players only need this address when their launcher cannot import it by drag-and-drop.
launcher.domainsDescription: Skin and cape URLs are resolved automatically after launcher login.

init.title: Finish initial setup
init.headline: Finish Aster initial setup
init.description: No administrator account exists yet. Create the first admin and set the public address people use to reach this site.
init.cardDescription: This account becomes the first administrator. The public site URL is used to build launcher setup URLs and texture URLs.
init.publicSiteUrlHelp: Enter the site root that players, launchers, and Minecraft clients can reach. Use only scheme and host, with an optional port, and no path.
init.publicSiteUrlInvalid: The public site URL is not valid.
init.publicSiteUrlProtocol: The public site URL must use http or https.
init.publicSiteUrlOriginOnly: The public site URL must be the site root without a path, query, or hash.
init.publicSiteUrlHttpWarning: Use HTTPS for public deployments. HTTP is intended for localhost or private-network testing.
init.featureAdminDescription: Manage runtime settings, profiles, textures, and audit records after setup.
init.featureUrlDescription: The site, Yggdrasil API, and texture URLs are derived from one public site URL.
init.featurePlayerDescription: Texture domains include this site plus the official Minecraft and Mojang domains.

login.title: Login
login.welcomeTitle: Welcome back. Sign in to your Aster account.
login.welcomePrefix: Welcome back. Sign in to your
login.welcomeDescription: Manage Minecraft profiles, skins, capes, launcher sessions, and account permissions from your workspace.
login.headline: Manage Minecraft profiles and textures after signing in.
login.setupHeadline: Initialize this Yggdrasil server before players sign in.
login.description: Site accounts control profile ownership, texture uploads, external auth bindings, and admin access. Launcher protocol login still uses the Yggdrasil API.
login.setupDescription: No administrator account exists yet. Create the first admin account to finish setup.
login.cardDescription: Use your site account to enter the workbench. Profile-name login is handled by launcher protocol endpoints.
login.setupCardDescription: This account becomes the first administrator and can manage runtime config, profiles, textures, and audit records.
login.registerDescription: Fill in the fields below to create your Aster account.
login.registerHeadline: Join Aster and start your Minecraft identity workspace.
login.registerHeroDescription: Create an account to manage profiles, textures, permissions, and account security from one place.
login.acceptTerms: I understand this account is used for Aster profile, texture, and authentication management.
login.passkeyUnsupported: Passkeys are not supported by this browser.
login.featureSecureDescription: Use site accounts with Yggdrasil-compatible launcher authentication.
login.featureProfileDescription: Manage Minecraft profile ownership, skins, and capes after signing in.
login.featureAuditDescription: Admin actions and sensitive changes stay traceable through audit logs.
login.registerFeatureSecureDescription: Use Yggdrasil-compatible authentication to protect your account.
login.registerFeatureProfileDescription: Manage Minecraft profiles and personal texture assets after signing in.
login.registerFeatureAuditDescription: Permissions and security-sensitive changes are handled inside the workbench.
login.registerConsentHint: Registration means your account joins this Aster authentication server.
